Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 1 to 3 Low temp 20 to 21 pressure 1 bar vibration 0 flow 0 tool at 0 energy about 0 point 4 to 0 point 5 kWh This looks like idle startup or standby

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 4 Temp jumps to 50 pressure 1 vibration 30 flow 5 tool at 5 energy 2 point 0 Event 5 Temp 55 pressure 1 point 5 vibration 35 flow 5 tool at 7 energy 2 point 5 Event 6 Temp 58 pressure 1 point 5 vibration 38 flow 5 tool at 10 energy 3 point 0 This is high temperature rising vibration material flowing tool moving high energy

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This looks like cutting or machining

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 7 Temp 40 pressure 2 vibration 10 flow 2 tool at 15 energy 2 point 0 Event 8 Same as 7 This is moderate conditions lower flow tool stable at 15 lower vibration

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Could be assembling or positioning

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait tool is at 15 and stable

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The tool is stationary at 15 mm which might indicate holding pressing position

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 9 Temp 80 pressure 2 vibration 50 flow 0 tool at 15 energy 5 point 0 Very high temp very high vibration no flow tool fixed at 15 max energy

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is likely welding high heat high vibration no flow since material is being joined not fed

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 10 Temp drops to 30 pressure 1 vibration 1 flow 0 tool 15 energy 1 point 0 Event 11 Temp 25 pressure 1 vibration 5 flow 1 tool 20 energy 1 point 5 Event 12 Same 25 1 5 1 20 1 point 6 Moderate low conditions some flow tool moved to 20

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Could be packaging or quality check with some movement

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait let us reconsider the sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Tool position timeline 0 to 5 to 7 to 10 to 15 stay to 15 to 15 to 20 to 20 to 0

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Different tool positions suggest different stations or phases in the process

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Event 10 might be quality inspection and events 11 to 12 might be packaging

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This mapping seems reasonable Tool position 0 idle then 5 to 10 cutting zone then 15 assembly weld zone then 20 packaging station then back to 0

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events 1 to 3 and 13 to 15 are idle standby because readings are minimal tool at home no flow no vibration and low energy

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events 4 to 6 are cutting metal because temperature vibration and energy rise strongly while material flow stays high and the tool advances

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events 7 to 8 are assembling parts because pressure is elevated temperature is moderate vibration is lower flow is reduced and the tool is held at a fixed assembly position

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 9 is welding because there is a temperature spike maximum vibration no material flow fixed tool position and peak energy use

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 10 is quality inspection because temperature and vibration drop sharply after welding there is no flow energy is low and the tool remains at the weld position

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Events 11 to 12 are packaging because the tool moves to a new station with low temperature and vibration slight material flow and moderate stable energy

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The final mapping is solid because event 10 fits post weld inspection and events 11 to 12 fit packaging better due to slight material flow at a new tool position
